manifest.name: AI Workflow Generator
manifest.description: Generate AI image/video workflow files for ComfyUI, A1111, Diffusers, and APIs.
manifest.author: AI Workflow Generator Team

tools.name: generate_workflow
tools.description: Generate an AI image/video generation workflow from natural language description. Supports ComfyUI JSON, A1111 params, Diffusers Python, Replicate API requests, and Midjourney prompts.

description.description: Workflow description including platform, model, and feature requirements. Example: 'SDXL txt2img with 2 LoRAs for ComfyUI'

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt (not used for Flux models)

options_json.description: Optional JSON string with additional parameters: loras, controlnets, hires_fix, width, height, steps, cfg, seed
